description: Letter fragment (missing the upper right corner), mercantile, from someone to "my maternal uncle [...] Avraham b. Salih b. [...]," probably 11th century. The writer is upset about something and enemies are gloating. Other merchants traveling to Syracuse and Barqah are mentioned. There are a few words in Arabic at the very end. ASE.
description_he: קטע מכתב מסחרי למי שנקרא 'דוד מצד אמי [...] אברהם בן סאלח בן [...]'; ככל הנראה המאה ה-11; מזכיר סוחרים שנוסעים לסירקוזה ולבארקה
